---
title: "PlottingSVG — SVGExport (legacy flat document)"
format: html
---

## Role

`PlottingSVG/SVGExport.hpp` provides the **flat** SVG document path used by DataViewer: `buildSVGDocument`, `renderSceneToSVG`, and `createScalebarSVG`, plus `SVGExportParams` and `ScalebarTimeRange`.

It composes the per-batch renderers (`SVGPolyLineRenderer`, `SVGGlyphRenderer`, `SVGRectangleRenderer`) and matches the historical XML layout (single list of elements under `<svg>`, DataViewer `<desc>` text).

New widgets should prefer `SVGSceneRenderer` and `SVGDocument` (named layers); this module remains for parity with existing exports.

## See also

- [PlottingSVG index](index.qmd)
- [Roadmap](roadmap.md)
